flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Miami Dade College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Miami Dade College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (34.7% → 45.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miami Dade College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (39.7k → 46.2k).
